title: MD
biography: Myint Htwe is a Myanmar public health physician who served as WHO Representative and Minister of Health. Led Myanmar's health system reforms and malaria control programs.
aiSummary: Myint Htwe is a public health specialist at Ministry of Health, Myanmar. Based in Myanmar.
